entry.title: Unable to purchase SAP certification exam attempt from India.
entry.content: Hello, Unable to purchase SAP certification exam attempt from India. The page will directed to leaning Hub portal and due to that unable to schedule the certification exam.

entry.title: Controlling Reports: Aging Reports - Calculation errors in SAP B1 TB_1100 training manual
entry.content:
Dear Community,

I was preparing a training session on the Controlling Reports: Aging Reports using the training Manual when I come across to calculation errors of the Balance Due, Aging Intervals and the Percentages on the training Manual TB-1100 (page 225 or 235 on slide).

I request the update of this to ensure consistency and correctness of the training data.

Below the screen with the errors and attached is the correct information.

"...In the image you can see both A/R invoices for Funtech the customer and A/P invoices for Funtech the
vendor. The total balance due took into consideration the A/P invoices amount."

Best Regards

Santos Joao

entry.title: Questionmark Secure for SAP Certification - how to test
entry.content:
I have installed Questionmark secure on my pc. 

If I click on it the error appears: "Questionmark Secure Browser must be opened from a .qmsb file or a .qmsb: URL.

How should I proceed?

Thank you

entry.title: cannot reschedule test after a failed test
entry.content: I scheduled a test today for C_SIGBT_2409 Certification but failed the test with score of 71, passing is 75. I need to reschedule a new test, this is urgent I need to do this before end of March 2025. But the exam appointment page showing my old appointment with a green clock and does not allow me to schedule new one. It shows a green clock instead of a calendar to pick new date. Appreciate your help!

entry.title: Urgent: Issues with SAP Certification Renewal and Learning Hub Subscription
entry.content:
Hello SAP Community,

I am reaching out to share my recent experience and seek guidance regarding the renewal of my SAP certification and the purchase of an individual Learning Hub subscription.

I have been an SAP consultant for 13 years, working both as a partner and now as a customer. Recently, I received a notification to extend the validity of my SAP certification. Upon realizing that I needed to purchase a Learning Hub subscription, I informed my manager, who encouraged me to keep my certification valid. Consequently, I purchased an individual Learning Hub subscription on Thursday (Order ID: 0002281064).

To my surprise, I did not receive any confirmation or access to the Learning Hub even after 24 hours. I raised multiple support tickets but struggled to get a proper response. On Sunday, I finally received a response from an SAP store admin, who mistakenly treated my request as a partner request. After clarifying that it was an individual request, they informed me that they couldn't fulfill the order and suggested purchasing certification attempts instead.

I am utterly surprised and annoyed by this response and the lack of maturity from SAP Learning support. Here are my concerns:

  1. What are the guidelines for maintaining SAP certification validity, especially when changing companies? Do certifications lapse with a change in organization?
  2. Where can I find relevant support and guidance for individual certification renewal and Learning Hub subscriptions?
  3. Why is there no proper channel or guidance to address these issues?

I believe it is crucial for people to be aware of these challenges. I am on the verge of losing my certification due to the lack of proper guidance from SAP. I hope this post brings attention to the issue and helps others who might be facing similar challenges.

Thank you for your support and guidance.

SAP Learning Solution  Certification  SAP Extended Warehouse Management @SAP

entry.title: C_TS4FI_2023 practice questions
entry.content: I'm looking for C_TS4FI_2023 practice questions. Could anyone share reliable study materials or insights from a recent successful attempt?

entry.title: Internal server error exam appointments
entry.content:
Hi there 

I am not able to access EXAM APPOINTMENTS in sapcertification.questionmark.com. It gives me an Internal Server Error (500) - see screenshot attached.

Due to this I cant reschedule / cancel already scheduled exams!

It has been happening since 2 days already; I have raised a ticket 5000139316 in SAP Learning Self Service(s) https://lso-ssrv-app.cfapps.eu10-004.hana.ondemand.com/lso/

Has anyone else faced this issue?

Thanks

Arijit Das

entry.title: Graduate Student Programs for SAP Certification - Seeking Advice
entry.content:
Hello SAP Community,

I'm currently pursuing my Master's in Information Systems and have about 5 years of experience as an ABAP Developer.

As I continue my academic journey, I'm looking to enhance my credentials with the SAP Certified Associate - Back-End Developer - ABAP Cloud  and SAP Fiori Application Developer certification. I'm specifically interested in:

  • Are there any special programs or discounts available for graduate students pursuing SAP certifications
  • Does SAP offer any university alliance programs that provide certification opportunities?
  • Has anyone here completed this certification while being a student? If so, what was your experience like?
  • Any recommendations on the best preparation resources for this certification that are budget-friendly for students?
  • Are there any mentorship programs available for students aiming to specialize in SAP development?

Additionally, if there are any specific grants, scholarships, or corporate sponsorship programs that support SAP certification for graduate students, I'd appreciate that information as well.

I believe this certification would strengthen my professional credentials and prior industry experience, making me more competitive in the job market as I advance my career in SAP development.

Thank you in advance for your insights and advice!

Best regards,
Kavyasri

entry.title: Successfully Passed the C_IBP_2502 Exam! 🎉
entry.content:
I’m thrilled to share that I have successfully passed the C_IBP_2502 exam! 🚀 This was a challenging yet rewarding journey, and I couldn’t have done it without PassExam4Sure. Their resources and guidance were instrumental in my preparation.

For anyone preparing for this certification, I highly recommend checking them out. Best of luck to all future test-takers! 💪📚

#Certification #Success #C_IBP_2502 #PassExam4Sure

entry.title: Request for Reconsideration of Yearly Certification Renewal Policy – SAP ABAP on HANA (C_TAW12_750)
entry.content:
Greetings!

I am writing to express a concern shared by many senior SAP consultants, including myself, who specialize in ABAP on HANA and are planning for certification.

About Me:

  • SAP ABAP Consultant with over 9 years of hands-on project experience.
  • Proficient in Core ABAP, ABAP on HANA, ODATA, Adobe Forms, and SAP Script.
  • Currently preparing for the SAP Certified Development Associate - ABAP for SAP HANA 2.0 (Exam Code: C_TAW12_750).

Learning Path Completed:

  • TAW10e — ABAP Fundamentals
  • TAW12e — Advanced ABAP on HANA
  • HA100 — SAP HANA Introduction
  • HA400 — ABAP Programming for SAP HANA

My career goal is to continue working in ABAP & HANA for the next decade without shifting to other technologies like Fiori, RAP, or Cloud-only models.

Key Concern: Given my commitment to working in the same technology for the foreseeable future, I question the necessity of paying substantial fees annually for certification renewal or mandatory Learning Hub subscriptions.

Challenges Faced by Consultants:

  • Lack of reimbursement from most employers.
  • No salary increase or bonus tied to certification.
  • Absence of financial support from employers.

Arguments Against Yearly Renewal:

  1. ABAP is a mature and stable language.
  2. Core ABAP & ABAP on HANA do not undergo yearly changes like Cloud products.
  3. Why should we pay annually if we are working on the same release and technology?
  4. Renewal should be based on need, not time.
  5. The current renewal policy appears to be more of a revenue-generation model than a knowledge validation process.
  6. Consultants working in support or maintenance projects may not use new features.
  7. SAP does not offer any special benefits for paying yearly renewal fees.

Suggestions for SAP:

  • Introduce Lifetime Certification for stable SAP modules like ABAP.
  • Require renewal only when a major version change occurs (e.g., S/4HANA Cloud RAP mandatory knowledge).
  • Reduce Learning Hub costs for individual consultants.
  • Offer special Learning Hub pricing for self-learners or freelancers.
  • Recognize long-term consultants with experience-based recognition badges.

Final Question: Why should consultants pay yearly fees to validate their knowledge in a technology where no new learning or project exposure is required?

entry.title: Anyone taken the sap C_S4CFI_2504 exam recently? Need advice on resources + tricky topics
entry.content:
Hello, I’m prepping for the C_S4CFI_2504 exam (SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition – Financial Accounting) and was hoping to get some insight from anyone who's taken it recently.

I’ve been going through the official SAP Learning Journey, which is helpful, but I still feel a bit shaky on a few things, especially when it comes to organizational structures (company code, chart of accounts, etc.) in the cloud setup. It’s a bit confusing how they all connect.

I’m also wondering what topics you’d say are the most important to really focus on, anything you wish you’d studied more before taking the exam? Were there any surprise questions or tricky areas that caught you off guard? And lastly, are there any good practice tests or preparation resources out there besides the Learning Hub that helped you prepare? I’d really appreciate any tips or pointers you’re willing to share, just trying to go into this feeling a bit more confident. Thanks in advance!

entry.title: What are the free certification available for Consultant?
entry.content: I want to know which are the free certification are available in SAP on learning.sap.com

entry.title: Retirement of C_HRHFC - SAP SuccessFactors Full Cloud/Hybrid Cloud Certification
entry.content:
Hello Community,

i planed a certification attempt in the next weeks for the C_HRHFC - SAP SuccessFactors Full Cloud/Core Hybrid Certification.
Since last week the certification has a warning section that it will retire in june 2025 and the message "We recommend to take a look at the available certification portfolio for an alternative to get certified in. - The recommended alternative is HRH98 which leads only to a completion badge."

https://learning.sap.com/certifications/sap-certified-associate-sap-successfactors-full-cloud-core-hybrid#about

Is this correct that there will be no certification anymore for such an important topic in the SAP SuccessFactors space? 🙄

Thanks in advance for any information / clarifaction on this topic.

best regards

Sören

entry.title: Digital badge didn't receive
entry.content:
Digital Badge not received after passing the certification

on 21st April 2025, I completed the certification C_TS4FI_2023. After successfully completing the exam, i received a mail that i have passed the exam. However, I have not received any follow on mail to claim the digital badge, and also when I check certification tab under 'My learnings' section the certificate is not available.

What should I do ?

entry.title: “quota exceeded" error in SAP Build basic trial environment
entry.content:
Dear Community,

I am currently preparing for the C_LCNC_2406 (SAP Certified Associate - Low-Code/No-Code Developer - SAP Build) certification, which requires completion of the "Experiencing End-to-End SAP Build" system exercise ( https://learning.sap.com/learning-journeys/experiencing-end-to-end-sap-build ).
As part of this exercise, I am instructed to create a new process in SAP Build Process Automation using the provided SAP Build basic trial environment. Unfortunately, when attempting to create a new Process there, I encounter the following error:

Error

Permitted quota of 750 was exceeded (type: "project").

Correlation Id: e6afe57f-1cc0-47b7-64c8-762ce904183e

Has anyone experienced this issue before and knows how I can approach or resolve it?

I’ve already created a case in the SAP Learning help center, but the SAP Learning Support Team informed me that this issue lies outside their support scope as the trial environment is publicly hosted.

I truly appreciate any help or suggestions you can provide.

Best regards,
Anna

entry.title: Number of attempts - Invalid
entry.content:
Hello Wagner,

I have raised support ticket and no response.

Voyalpad Usman Khan

Thanks for your helps

Best regard !

entry.title: Certification Not Received for C_TS462_2023 Exam Passed on May 8, 2025
entry.content:
Dear SAP Certification Team,

I hope this message finds you well.

I am writing to inform you that I have not yet received my SAP certification for the exam C_TS462_2023, which I successfully passed on May 8, 2025. I have been regularly checking Credly, but the badge has not been issued yet, and I have not received any certification communication either.
What should i do Please let me know

entry.title: Certification not received
entry.content: I have appeared for the SAP Global certification exam on 2nd May,2025 for C_TS4FI_2023. I have cleared the exam with 75% score and I even received the mail regarding my result and the scorecard. But I have not received the Certificate yet on my mail id . Kindly help me with this ASAP. It's very urgent as I have cleared an interview for SAP Consultant Role in a reputed  US company and it is mandatory for me to share the Credly Badge with them  in order to get the offer letter otherwise I will miss this opportunity. I genuinely ask for your support right now as soon as possible as it will decide my Job confirmation. I have done everything to contact the SAP support team and have raised the ticket on 4th May itself and since then they have not responded even once. This is my Case ID : 5000155124. Also I have done everything which is required to receive the certificate including adding 2 email in Universal ID & registering on Credly with the primary email or other email which is associated with this account of mine. I request your response ASAP.

entry.title: Replacement C_THR12_2025 Certification HCM for other
entry.content:
Hello everyone!

I would like to know if the C_THR12_2025 Certification: SAP Certified Application Associate – SAP HCM for S/4HANA is replaced by any other certification, for example, C_HCMP_2311 SAP Certified Associate - SAP HCM Payroll for SAP S/4HANA which includes HCM + Payroll.

Thank you.
